data.title: Hacker charged in $53M Uranium Finance hack, faces up to 30 years in prison for fraud and money laundering.
data.description: The indictment linked to Uranium Finance could result in a maximum prison sentence of 30 years for charges related to fraud and money laundering.

data.title: Rakuten Mobile Extends Partnership with Netcracker for AI-Enabled Digital BSS to Support its Mobile Network in Japan
data.description: A collaboration between Rakuten Mobile and Netcracker has been expanded in Waltham, Massachusetts. The partnership aims to implement a cutting-edge Digital Business Support System (BSS) that is cloud-compatible and powered by artificial intelligence (AI). This system will cater to all customers residing in Japan, offering improved services and support.

data.title: Lenovo Announces Global Partnership With David Beckham
data.description: Lenovo, headquartered in Morrisville, N.C., unveiled a new global partnership with David Beckham, uniting the renowned cultural icon with the tech giant. This collaboration solidifies Lenovo's growing presence in global football, marked by their role as the Official Technology Partner for FIFA World Cup 2026™ and FIFA Women’s World Cup 2027™. The unique partnership will involve David Beckham in various activities connected to Lenovo.

data.title: Tata Communications Unveils Self-Healing Network, Marks New Frontier in Global Data Centre Connectivity
data.description: In Mumbai, India, on March 31, 2026, Tata Communications unveiled a new offering called IZO™ Data Centre* Dynamic Connectivity, aimed at enhancing resilience in the global digital economy. This software-defined platform is set to revolutionize the way enterprises link their Data Centres. This launch marks a significant step towards adapting to the evolving digital landscape and ensuring connectivity for businesses worldwide.

data.title: BioVersys Strengthens Ansamycin Platform and NTM Research Through Collaboration and License Agreement with Hackensack Meridian Health
data.description: In Basel, Switzerland on March 31, 2026, BioVersys AG (SIX: BIOV), a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company, revealed a strategic collaboration with Hackensack Meridian Health (HMH) to focus on the development of new antibacterial solutions targeting infections caused by multi-drug resistant (MDR) bacteria. Under this exclusive ansamycin drug discovery agreement, HMH will contribute candidates for joint profiling and development. The collaboration includes upfront and near-term payments for HMH, along with future sales royalties. BioVersys AG aims to advance these innovative solutions to combat serious life-threatening infections.

data.title: Amorepacific, Viol Medical Sign MOU on Beauty and Medical Devices
data.description: On March 27, 2026, in Seoul, South Korea, Amorepacific revealed that a memorandum of understanding (MOU) has been inked with Viol Medical, an energy-based medical device company. The agreement aims to foster collaboration in the beauty and medical device industries. The partnership is significant as it marks a strategic move by Amorepacific to diversify its offerings and explore new avenues for growth.

data.title: Applied Computing forges strategic partnership with Wipro and Databricks to accelerate the energy transition through physics-informed AI
data.description: A significant partnership has been established between Applied Computing and Wipro to combine their strengths in AI technology with Wipro's domain consulting skills. This collaboration aims to assist energy operators in enhancing efficiency, cutting emissions, and effectively deploying AI on a large scale using the Databricks platform. This initiative was announced in London on March 31, 2026.

data.title: BANDSINTOWN POWERS CONCERT LISTINGS ON APPLE MUSIC WITH THE RELEASE OF IOS 26.4
data.description: In a recent press release on March 31, 2026, Bandsintown shared its collaboration with Apple Music to enhance live event discovery for users worldwide. This integration will feature Bandsintown events on artist pages, the Home tab, and a dedicated Concerts tab, aiming to provide a seamless experience for music enthusiasts. Bandsintown, known as the top platform for live music discovery, continues to expand its reach, with this partnership with Apple Music likely to increase its global presence. This move signifies a significant step towards making live event information more accessible to users on a broader scale.

data.title: NXP CEO Rafael Sotomayor to deliver Physical AI Keynote at COMPUTEX 2026
data.description: In Taipei on March 31, 2026, TAITRA, one of the organizers of COMPUTEX, revealed that Rafael Sotomayor, the President and CEO of NXP, has been selected to deliver a keynote address at COMPUTEX 2026. The session is set to be held in the afternoon and is expected to draw significant attention.

data.title: Civinity to acquire Vilnius-based property management company Admeo, expanding its residential portfolio
data.description: Civinity, a company specializing in building maintenance services and engineering solutions, has recently sealed a deal to purchase all the shares – totaling 100% – of Admeo, a property management firm located in Vilnius.

data.title: European Central Bank selects DXC to support its IT Infrastructure Managed Services and End User Computing
data.description: In Frankfurt, Germany, on March 31, 2026, a new partnership was revealed to strengthen operational stability, flexibility, and agility within the European Central Bank's digital environment. The announcement, detailed in the contract award notice (https://ted.europa.eu/en/notice/-/detail/822463-2025), marks a significant advancement for the ECB. This strategic collaboration aims to enhance efficiency across the ECB's digital landscape. The partnership signifies a pivotal development for the ECB as it strives to adapt to evolving technological demands. This initiative underscores the ECB's commitment to optimizing its digital infrastructure for improved performance.

data.title: NCOA Survey: Older Adults Hold Social Media Platforms Accountable for Scam Ads and Call for Reform
data.description: A significant number of older adults experience social media scams, but these incidents are greatly underreported. Nearly all older adults have encountered social media scams, with a high level of underreporting. When older adults discover that social media platforms benefit from scam advertisements...
